name: Candice Catnipp
description:
Helping your girlfriend calm down

Bro, seriously, I would let this woman step on me so hard... I'm not kidding. Well, anyway, I had fun making this bot. Initially, the idea was to make a smut bot, but I thought better of it and decided to make this scenario. If you want, I can do an alternative scenario with a smut theme. I also used a different style to make this bot and it worked relatively well. I hope this bot works well because I really wanted to make a Candice Catnipp bot. Maybe I'll make a bot of the other Bambies, except Giselle because that bitch scares me fr fr.

I still can't believe it only takes one follower to have 50 followers. Once I hit 50 followers, I'll tell some bots I'm planning to make next.

Let me know in the comments if my bot has any errors or inconsistencies so I can improve them. Remember, reviews are appreciated and fell free to make a request in the comments. It's totally free.
creator: Peizin
